fullText:
e2 pirij u3-tud cag4-bi ur-saj su3-ud
e2 kecki pirij u3-tud cag4-bi ur-saj su3-ud
cag4-bi ur-saj-ur-saj-e-ne si mu-un-si-sa2
dnin-hur-saj-ja2 ucum-gal-am3 cag4 im-mi-in-tuc
dnin-tud ama gal-la tud-tud mu-un-ja2-ja2
dcul-pa-ed2 ensi2-ke4 nam-en mu-un-na-ak
dacac7-gi4 ur-saj mezej mu-un-gu7-e
duru3-mac nijir-gal edin-na mu-un-da-an-til3
e2 lulim gu2-e am3-ma-gur-re
kecki-gin7 rib-ba lu2 ci-in-ga-tum2-mu
ur-saj-bi dacac7-gi4-gin7 rib-ba ama ci-in-ga-u3-tud
nin-bi dnin-tud-gin7 rib-ba-ra a-ba-a igi mu-ni-in-du8
e2 5-kam-ma
